title: Luki's Grand Capitals
description: Rebuilt vanilla villages and illager structures to breathe new life into your world!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5985414b620603d7ac53d4e3b8fec9ad5daf7e4e.png)
# About:
Luki's Grand Capitals is a new village mod for 1.19-1.21 focused on making all villages in an upgraded and more suitable style for some players. Every village has its own unique build style and loot, which makes them fun to discover and explore. 
Also,  pillager structures have also been remade, including the Outpost, Mansion, and swamp hut. Along with these vanilla structures, more custom villages and structures are planned, including a Jungle, Swamp, and Pillager Village.
# Attention: 
This data pack is now in its beta, some custom villages and structures have not been added yet, but they are on their way. Some villages may generate oddly due to vanilla terrain.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Roadmap:

-BETA-

Beta v1.1- Pillager Village Ships, and Dungeons.

Beta v1.2- Jungle Village and Snowy Village Re-Remake.

Beta v1.3- Witch Village and Swamp Hut Re-Remake.

Beta v1.4- Iceberg Village and Badlands Village

Beta v1.5- Meadow Village and Secret Village.

-A config menu and some extra QOL things, can't do these yet because I can't really code but hopefully in the future.

</details>
